key_insight: This article reads the four paradoxes mechanised in the coq-paradoxes package, namely the Burali-Forti paradox in system U, the Diaconescu paradox that the axiom of choice entails excluded middle, the Reynolds paradox that System F has no set-theoretic model,

paper_title: Four Paradoxes and a Proof Assistant: Burali-Forti, Diaconescu, Reynolds, and Hurkens in the coq-paradoxes library
